summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI-Powered Machine Failure Root Cause Analysis Platform. Backend API functionality is excellent with 12/13 endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI is well-designed and functional with successful user flows. Analysis pipeline completes successfully generating anomalies, hypotheses, ML results, and root cause reports.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - LLM budget exceeded and NoneType error
critical_bugs.details: Budget exceeded error: 'Current cost: 0.014907, Max budget: 0.001' and 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' error in chat handler

ui_bugs.issue: Tabs not visible when no active analysis
ui_bugs.details: Expected behavior - tabs only appear when analysis has results

integration_issues.issue: Chat UI accessible but backend chat API fails
integration_issues.details: Frontend chat interface works correctly but backend returns 500 error

passed_tests: User registration with JWT token generation
File upload functionality (CSV, PDF, Excel, TXT)
Analysis results retrieval with anomalies, hypotheses, ML results, root cause
Frontend login/register UI with proper routing
File selection and analysis initiation UI

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All UI flows working, 1 backend integration issue)

critical_fixes: Fix chat API budget issue - either increase LLM budget or implement proper error handling
Debug NoneType error in chat handler in server.py line ~313
recommendations: Chat functionality is the only major issue blocking full platform usability
All other core features (upload, analysis, results, reports) work excellently
Analysis pipeline successfully generates comprehensive RCA reports with confidence scores
